_comment_how_to_add_competitor: HOW TO ADD NEW COMPETITOR: 1) Pick existing market key. 2) Append object with name/url/angle. 3) Keep notes short and factual. 4) Prefer competitors with comparable ICP and channel mix. 5) Re-check messaging examples quarterly.
